settings.heading: Warranty & Support
settings.subheading: We stand behind the quality of our products and are committed to supporting you after your purchase.

settings.title: New Items
settings.description: All new products come with a 1-year warranty, backed by local support. If you need assistance, reach us via any channel below.

settings.title: Pre-Owned Items
settings.description: Our warranty applies to all certified refurbished and pre-owned products. Each item is verified to meet our standards.

settings.heading: Ready to Help
settings.subheading: If you have any questions or need support, reach out.
